$schema._description: Event schedule per game. All datetimes use ISO 8601 with explicit UTC-5 offset. Start times are 10:00 UTC-5 for mid-version events (confirmed from GI/ZZZ official announcements); patch-day events use the per-game maintenance-end time (GI T05:00:00Z, HSR/ZZZ T03:00:00Z). End times are 03:59 UTC-5 = 08:59 UTC, the minute before the 04:00 America server daily reset — confirmed as the universal HoYoverse event close time.

_fields.stages: Optional ordered array of the stage / chapter / quest / progression-node names that make up the event. List in completion order; shown as a numbered checklist in the event popup. Use the format's real structure (story acts, combat difficulty tiers, daily check-ins, etc.).
_fields.effort: Optional short human estimate of active playtime to fully clear the event (not the calendar run window). e.g. '~2h total', '~30 min', '~2 min/day for 7 days'. Shown next to the run length in the popup.
_fields.image: Optional event banner/menu image URL from the game Fandom wiki (static.wikia.nocookie.net). null when the wiki has no clean event image yet.

gi.name: To Temper Thyself and Journey Far
gi.tagline: Story event — follow Escoffier's journey across multiple chapters and complete combat trials to earn a free 5★ constellation.
gi.rewards: + 5-Star Stella Fortuna (free constellation) · Crown of Insight · Dust of Enlightenment
stages: Story Act II — unlocks a few days later
Combat Trial I–IV — themed challenge stages
gi.effort: ~3–4h total; acts unlock on a staggered schedule across the run

gi.name: Sunny Summer Fontinalia
gi.tagline: Version 6.7 flagship event — join a summer festival across Fontaine to earn a free 4★ Charlotte with a new outfit plus a large Primogem haul.
stages: Stage 2: second mini-game unlocks (few days later)
gi.effort: ~4–5h across the event; new stages unlock every few days

gi.name: Stygian Onslaught
gi.tagline: Wave-survival endgame — hold out against escalating enemy waves across difficulty tiers for Primogems and materials.
stages: Ready Phase — set your two teams
Weekly refresh — re-clear for the ranking score
gi.effort: ~30–45 min per full clear; retry-friendly, refreshes weekly

gi.name: Final Long-Range Sightlines
gi.tagline: Shooting mini-game — fire observation grenades and guide each projectile as far as possible without hitting obstacles for Primogem rewards.

gi.name: Dance Dance Easy-Breezy Disco
gi.tagline: Rhythm mini-game — a co-op rerun of Dance Dance Dynamic Disco; follow the lead dancer's beat to earn Primogems and materials.

gi.name: Ley Line Overflow
gi.tagline: Farming bonus — Ley Line Outcrops grant double Mora and Hero's Wit for the event window.
gi.rewards: + Double Mora & Hero's Wit (Ley Line Outcrops)
stages: Blossom of Wealth — double Mora (up to daily claims)
Blossom of Revelation — double Hero's Wit
gi.effort: ~5 min/day; a set number of double claims over the window

hsr.name: Stellar Companions
hsr.tagline: Permanent exchange store — accumulate Convergence Points across the patch season to redeem a free 5★ character of your choice.
hsr.rewards: + 1 free 5★ character (exchange via Stellar Convergence store)
stages: Redeem your chosen 5★ at the Convergence store
hsr.effort: passive; ~5 min/day of missions across the season

hsr.name: 4.4 Gift of Odyssey
hsr.tagline: Log-in reward — check in on 7 separate days before the patch ends to claim 10 Star Rail Special Passes.
stages: Day 1–7 check-in — any 7 days in the window

hsr.name: Antigraft Brickbuster
hsr.tagline: Version 4.4 flagship — take on a request from Aventurine and investigate IPC corruption by stacking data bricks in a block-building mini-game.
hsr.rewards: + 900 Stellar Jade · Self-Modeling Resin · 2× Tracks of Destiny
hsr.effort: ~1.5–2h total; stages unlock across the patch

hsr.name: Fate/Star Rail Night
hsr.tagline: Fate/stay night collab combat event — defeat foes to unlock their Noble Phantasms and stack escalating abilities across the Holy Grail War.
hsr.rewards: + 1,650 Stellar Jade · Self-Modeling Resin · 2× Tracks of Destiny
stages: Grail War Round 1 — unlock first Noble Phantasm

hsr.name: Fate Contract: Renewal
hsr.tagline: Collab claim event — log in during the window to pick a free 5★ Archer or Gilgamesh plus ascension and trace materials to raise them to Level 60.
hsr.rewards: + Free 5★ Archer or Gilgamesh (to Lv. 60) · 10 Star Rail Special Passes

hsr.name: 4.4 Planar Fissure
hsr.tagline: Simulated Universe bonus — all SU runs during this window grant double Planar Ornament relic drops (up to 12 claims).
stages: Claim double Planar Ornament drops (up to 12 times)
hsr.effort: ~15–20 min per run; 12 claims over the window

hsr.name: Garden of Plenty
hsr.tagline: Calyx bonus — claim double Golden and Crimson Calyx rewards when spending Trailblaze Power for the event duration.
stages: Spend Trailblaze Power on Golden/Crimson Calyxes
Claim double drops (up to a set number of claims)

zzz.name: Bangbang! The Genius and the Miracle Chip
zzz.tagline: Story-driven Bangboo event — navigate narrative chapters, solve chip-circuit puzzles, and unlock cosmetic rewards.

zzz.name: Assemble! Mock Exam Comeback Plan
zzz.tagline: Hollow Zero variant — navigate exam-themed Hollow maps, answer ability-check questions, and defeat boss Ethereals at the end.
zzz.rewards: + 1,200 Polychrome · Hamster Cage Pass · Boisterous Echoes (A-rank W-Engine)

zzz.name: Celestial Nexus Intelligence Dossier
zzz.tagline: Investigation event — gather clues and scan evidence across New Eridu districts to piece together a multi-part conspiracy.

zzz.name: Gleaming Shadow Team Battle
zzz.tagline: Shiyu Defense variant — clear shadow-realm combat waves under fixed-team restrictions; higher nodes require attribute-specific strategies.

zzz.name: Art is Bangboo!
zzz.tagline: Daily check-in event — log in each day to collect Polychrome and Boopons; no gameplay required.
stages: Daily check-in — log in each day of the window

zzz.name: Tales of the Hobbling Crow
zzz.tagline: Narrative story event — follow the Hobbling Crow faction through a multi-chapter story with light combat sequences.
